message:
feat(storage): Implement FTS search API with BM25 ranking, snippets, and error handling

- Add SearchResult struct with segment, snippet, highlight, and score fields
- Implement search_fts_with_snippets() using FTS5's snippet() and bm25() functions
- Add validate_fts_query() for structured error messages on invalid FTS syntax
- Add SearchOptions with configurable snippet markers and limits
- Add AgentSessionRecord and session tracking APIs
- Add comprehensive FTS tests for snippets, scoping, and error handling

Closes wa-4vx.3.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
